text.tspan: // Scalar: process 1 float at a time
// Scalar: process 1 float at a time

div.p: Scalar Memory Access Pattern: 128 iterations × 2 loads = 256 memory ops Cache line utilization: ~6% (only 4 of 64 bytes used per load)
SIMD Memory Access Pattern: 16 iterations × 2 loads = 32 memory ops Cache line utilization: ~50% (32 of 64 bytes used per load)
